title: Facilities, Racks, Cabling, Power, and Environment · Incident Case: Net Patch Fiber Panels
summary: Plan an MDF, IDFs, racks, patching, power, cooling, security, and maintenance access for a new site. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net patch fiber panels increment in a facilities-ready network installation package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Document patch panels, fiber distribution panels, labels, polarity, ports, pathways, and change ownership.
Place MDF and IDF spaces, rack units, pathways, grounding, clearances, and service loops from building constraints.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
